title: Sqlitelogictest set queries with wrong results
poc: CREATE TABLE tab0(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM tab0 cor0 WHERE + col2 + + + 89 + - CAST ( NULL AS REAL ) NOT IN ( 28 * + 37 - ( + col1 ) + + 63, 4, ( ( + - col0 ) ), + col2 );
key_bug_features: Incorrect query syntax leading to wrong results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(col1 INTEGER, col2 REAL, col3 VARCHAR(50), col4 DATE);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 2.5, 'test1', '2023-01-01'), (2, NULL, 'test2', '2023-01-02'), (3, 3.5, 'test3', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE col1 + 1 NOT IN (SELECT col1 FROM test_table WHERE col2 IS NULL);
UPDATE test_table SET col3 = 'updated' WHERE col1 = (SELECT MAX(col1) FROM test_table);
SELECT col1, col2 FROM test_table WHERE col2 + CAST(NULL AS REAL) IS NOT NULL;
